key_points.text: Compute Networking segment revenue grew 67% year-over-year to $193.5 billion in fiscal 2026, driven by major platform shifts in accelerated computing and AI. Data Center computing specifically grew 59% driven by demand for Blackwell platform.

citation.quote: Compute Networking revenue... Revenue from Data Center computing grew 59% driven by demand for our Blackwell computing platform.

key_points.text: Data Center networking revenue surged 142% year-over-year, driven by introduction and ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems and growth of Ethernet and InfiniBand platforms.

citation.quote: Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142% driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems and the growth of Ethernet and InfiniBand platforms.

key_points.text: NVIDIA Blackwell architecture dominated Q1 FY2027 shipments with systems representing the majority of revenue. Edge Computing revenue for Q1 FY2027 was $6.4 billion, up 29% year-over-year, driven by robust Blackwell workstation demand.

citation.quote: Blackwell continued to account for the majority of our system shipments... Edge Computing revenue for the first quarter was $6.4 billion, up 29% from a year ago... driven by robust Blackwell workstation demand.

key_points.text: Gross margin improved in Q1 FY2027 to 74.9% from 60.5% year-over-year, driven by lower inventory provisions as prior year included $4.5 billion charge for H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations, which has now recurred in non-current period.

citation.quote: Gross margin increased from a year ago on lower inventory provisions, primarily due to the prior year's $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations.

key_points.text: Compute Networking segment operating income in Q1 FY2027 grew 142% year-over-year to $53.3 billion, driven by revenue growth and non-recurrence of H20 inventory charge, demonstrating strong operational leverage.

citation.quote: The year-over-year increase in Compute Networking segment operating income in the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 was driven by the growth in revenue and the non-recurrence of a $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations.

key_points.text: NVIDIA powers over 78% of supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list, reflecting dominant market position in high-performance computing.

citation.quote: NVIDIA powers over 78% of the supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list.

key_points.text: The company unveiled the NVIDIA Rubin platform in fiscal year 2026, which is expected to commence production shipments in the second half of fiscal year 2027. Rubin delivers up to a 10x reduction in cost per token compared to Blackwell for agentic AI and reasoning workloads.

citation.quote: In fiscal year 2026, we unveiled the NVIDIA Rubin platform, which is expected to commence production shipments in the second half of fiscal year 2027. Built for agentic AI and reasoning, it excels at processing multi-step problem-solving and massive long-context workflows, delivering up to a 10x reduction in cost per token compared to Blackwell.
